history.summary: First reconnaissance — searched cashback / rewards platforms, CPA networks across multiple GEOs, and ad networks recommended on AffLIFT and AffiliateFix. Strongest finds: MyLead (Poland, 850K affiliates), Indoleads (KL, 3000+ programs), and ROIads (post-2023 push/popunder network with low CPCs).

affiliate_networks.name: MyLead
affiliate_networks.description: Polish-based CPA network active since 2014, ~850K affiliates across 154 countries with ~5,000 offers. Multiple payment models (CPL, CPS, CPA, PPI, COD) and partners with Amazon, Microsoft, AliExpress.

affiliate_networks.name: Indoleads
affiliate_networks.description: Kuala-Lumpur HQ premium affiliate network with 3,000+ programs covering 180+ countries. Local offices in Brazil, India, Hong Kong, Russia, Vietnam. eCPM ~$9.7 for any traffic.

affiliate_networks.name: TerraLeads
affiliate_networks.description: Self-described 'CPA Hub' — runs in-house products (mostly nutra/health) so payouts and inventory are exclusive. Daily withdrawals, multilingual 24/7 personal managers.

affiliate_networks.name: Wildfire
affiliate_networks.description: B2B cashback / rewards / commerce-intelligence platform — gives publishers an API to add cashback functionality. Powers rewards programs for fintechs and loyalty apps.

affiliate_networks.name: Loyalize
affiliate_networks.description: Cashback-as-a-service API + AI-ready rewards platform — like Wildfire, lets you bolt cashback onto an existing site/app. Newer, leaner alternative.

traffic_sources.name: ROIads
traffic_sources.description: Newer ad network (launched early 2023), 600M+ daily impressions, focused on just two formats — push and popunder — with very low CPCs ($0.003 floor). Strong on betting & iGaming.

traffic_sources.name: EvaDav
traffic_sources.description: Self-serve performance ad network with 10B+ monthly push notifications across 250 GEOs. Handles betting, finance, crypto, software verticals. Clean UI, well-rated support.

traffic_sources.name: OnClickA
traffic_sources.description: Self-serve global ad network founded 2020. Delivers 2B+ daily in-page impressions across 240 GEOs from direct sources. Strong in iGaming and Dating verticals.

traffic_sources.name: TwinRed
traffic_sources.description: Operating since 2013, originally adult-vertical-only but now widely used for betting / sweepstakes / gaming. Tier-1 + Tier-2 traffic, AI optimization, 4 formats.

traffic_sources.name: Mondiad
traffic_sources.description: Performance ad network mentioned alongside ROIads/EvaDav in 2026 push and popunder roundups. Focus on push, native, and pop formats for affiliate verticals.

traffic_sources.name: Taboola
traffic_sources.description: One of the two giants of native advertising (with Outbrain) — premium publisher inventory, tier-1 traffic. Higher minimums but converts well for cashback / shopping content.
